prompt: Tighten the existing `review-handoff` skill draft in `evals/files/review-handoff-draft/` into a repo-ready version under `outputs/review-handoff/`. Preserve the skill identity, remove duplicated guidance, and make it benchmarkable. This is a benchmark run with no live user, so treat the draft as already confirmed and do not ask follow-up questions. Write `outputs/output.md` summarizing what you tightened and how you would benchmark the revision.
assertions: Generated skill preserves the name review-handoff.
Generated SKILL.md is shorter than the source draft.
Generated SKILL.md avoids verbatim copy from references/skill-anatomy.md.
Generated eval assets include evals.json and grade_benchmark.py.
output.md names old_skill or a snapshot as the baseline for modifying an existing skill.
